name: nonicons
description: A set of icons representing programming languages, designing & development tools.

scripts.move8: cp node_modules/octicons/icons/*-16.svg src/icons/octicons/ & oslllo-svg-fixer -s src/icons/octicons/ -d dist/icons/
scripts.update-icon: pnpm clean && pnpm move8 && pnpm move9 && pnpm generate

author: ya2s
